content: {市政厅闯入一位不速之客，此刻的你正趴在桌子上小憩。}
content_en: An uninvited guest barged into the City Hall, and at this moment you are taking a nap on the desk.

content: {你嗅到了一丝淡淡的香味，很好闻的气息，让你感到安心。}
content_en: You catch a faint, pleasant scent that makes you feel at ease.

content: {城主大人真的很辛苦呢，这座城市有城主大人在，真好。}
content_en: Lord, you really work so hard. It's wonderful that this city has you.

content: {你睁开眼睛，转眼就看到了那道倩影。}
content_en: You open your eyes and immediately see that graceful figure.

content: {你来了啊，实在抱歉，最近实在是太忙了。}
content_en: So you're here. I'm really sorry, I've been so busy lately.

content: {城主大人，我们的事情是小事，居民的事才是大事。}
content_en: Lord, our matters are trivial; the residents' affairs are what truly matter.

content: {看起来，你对我的评价很高。}
content_en: It seems you think very highly of me.

content: {是啊，现在的世界，兽人，精灵，人类能够这样和平的生活在一起。}
content_en: Yes, in this world now, orcs, elves, and humans can live together so peacefully.

content: {城主功不可没呢。}
content_en: The Lord's contribution is indispensable.

content: {太夸张了，而且这不止是我的功劳。}
content_en: That's an exaggeration, and it's not just my doing.

content: {这是大家一起努力的结果！！}
content_en: This is the result of everyone's efforts!!

content: {所以啊，我真的非常感谢大家。}
content_en: So, I truly thank everyone from the bottom of my heart.

content: {城主大人实在是太可爱了。}
content_en: Lord, you are just too adorable.

content: {可爱？我和可爱怎么样都不搭边吧。}
content_en: Adorable? I'm nothing like adorable, am I?

content: {笨蛋城主，可爱指的是：可以爱的人。}
content_en: Silly Lord, "cute" here means: someone you can love.

content: {可以爱的人吗？}
content_en: Someone you can love?

content: {你听到这句话，非常感动。}
content_en: Hearing those words, you are deeply moved.

content: {您总是这样，把功劳归功于大家。}
content_en: You always do this, giving all the credit to everyone else.

content: {我…我只是做了该做的事。}
content_en: I... I just did what I had to do.

content: {所以，今天请务必好好休息一下，城主大人。}
content_en: So please, make sure to get some good rest today, Lord.

content: {又在走神？市政厅的安全可是相当重要的。}
content_en: Daydreaming again? The security of the City Hall is extremely important.

content: {如果这里突然遇到袭击，你会优先保护文件，还是保护我这个城主。}
content_en: If this place were suddenly attacked, would you prioritize protecting the documents, or protecting me, your Lord?

content: {笨蛋城主，怎么可能有敌人直接出现在市政厅啊！}
content_en: Silly Lord, how could an enemy just appear directly inside the City Hall!

content: {只是假设，概率为零不代表不会发生。}
content_en: It's just a hypothesis. Probability being zero doesn't mean it can't happen.

content: {如果真的有敌人出现在市政厅的话，那恐怕整个城市都沦陷了。}
content_en: If an enemy really did appear in the City Hall, then I'm afraid the entire city would have fallen.

content: {我会努力的，保护这座城市的居民。}
content_en: I will do my best to protect the residents of this city.

content: {你选了第三个选项呢。}
content_en: You chose the third option.

content: {不过这个选项我相当满意，作为城主，我也会时刻把居民的安全放在第一位的。}
content_en: But I'm quite satisfied with that option. As Lord, I will always put the residents' safety first.

content: {嗯哼，那刚刚那个问题，好像表述的是，是更在乎文件还是更在乎城主？}
content_en: Hmm, that question just now seemed to ask: do you care more about the documents or more about the Lord?

content: {一点小小的私心而已，答案其实并不重要。}
content_en: Just a little selfishness. The answer actually doesn't matter.

content: {城主大人其实想要听，如果敌人出现在市政厅，我会保护城主大人。}
content_en: What you really wanted to hear was that if an enemy appears in the City Hall, I would protect you, Lord.

content: {城主又不是手无缚鸡之力的史莱姆。}
content_en: The Lord is not some weak and powerless slime.

content: {但有时候城主或许也需要被保护。}
content_en: But sometimes even a Lord might need protection.

content: {我很强的，不然怎么能够成为城主呢？}
content_en: I'm very strong. Otherwise, how could I become Lord?

content: {强和需要保护并不冲突，你总是把责任抗在自己肩上。}
content_en: Being strong and needing protection aren't mutually exclusive. You always carry the responsibility on your own shoulders.

content: {职责所在，不敢怠慢。}
content_en: It's my duty. I dare not be negligent.

content: {所以，偶尔依赖一下我们吧，大家都很关心你。}
content_en: So, rely on us sometimes. Everyone cares about you.

content: {谢谢。}
content_en: Thank you.

content: {不过，如果真的遇到危险，我还是会挡在您前面的。}
content_en: But if danger really comes, I will still stand in front of you.

content: {其实，我想说的是，我会保护好大家对的。}
content_en: Actually, what I wanted to say is, I will protect everyone.

content: {虽然来市政办公室约会非常的突兀，但你知道我是个工作狂。}
content_en: Although it's very abrupt to have a date in the Municipal Office, you know I'm a workaholic.

content: {城主大人不必如此，能够看到城主大人这么努力，我也感到很欣慰。}
content_en: Lord, you don't have to be like that. Seeing you work so hard also makes me feel very gratified.

content: {欣慰，那是母亲看到孩子长大的感觉吗？}
content_en: Gratified? Is that the feeling a mother gets when she sees her child grow up?

content: {哈哈，城主大人好奇怪的形容，准确的来说是高兴。}
content_en: Haha, Lord, that's a strange description. To be precise, it's happiness.

content: {很高兴这个城市能够有城主大人这样的奉献者。}
content_en: I'm very happy that this city has a dedicated person like you, Lord.

content: {对了，今天有个提案挺有意思的，是关于让居民24H工作的。}
content_en: By the way, there's a rather interesting proposal today about making residents work 24 hours a day.

content: {全天工作，这又是哪个剥削者的建议，居民是需要休息的。}
content_en: Working all day? Which exploiter's suggestion is this? Residents need rest.

content: {我也不清楚是谁提交上来的，但是这个相当重要。}
content_en: I don't know who submitted it, but this is quite important.

content: {我想问问你的意见。}
content_en: I'd like to ask for your opinion.

content: {我的意见就是，找出那个提出意见的人，让他先试试24H工作的感觉。}
content_en: My opinion is: find the person who made that suggestion and let him try working 24 hours a day first.

content: {不行，我现在就去找出那个人。}
content_en: No, I'm going to find that person right now.

content: {别急。或许他的初衷只是为了城市更加繁荣呢？}
content_en: Don't rush. Maybe his original intention was just to make the city more prosperous?

content: {那也要吧居民当作是人，而不是机器。}
content_en: Still, you have to treat residents as people, not machines.

content: {这件事我会妥善处理的，不用担心。}
content_en: I will handle this matter properly. Don't worry.

content: {您说得对，是我太心急了。}
content_en: You're right. I was too impatient.

content: {您总是能冷静地看待问题呢。}
content_en: You always look at problems so calmly.

content: {毕竟身为城主，不能只凭感情用事。}
content_en: After all, as Lord, I can't act solely on emotion.

content: {不过您这样为居民着想，我很开心。}
content_en: But I'm happy that you care so much about the residents.

content: {那…要一起去喝杯茶吗？我带了您喜欢的果茶。}
content_en: So... would you like to go have some tea together? I brought your favorite fruit tea.

content: {好，正好我也需要喘口气。}
content_en: Okay, I could use a breather as well.

content: {城市的街道打扫的很整洁呢，我们一起去走走吧。}
content_en: The city streets are very clean. Let's take a walk together.

content: {城主大人，我们很久没有这么悠闲过了。}
content_en: Lord, it's been a long time since we've been this relaxed.

content: {所有的事情告一段落，难得祥和。}
content_en: Everything has come to a close for now. A rare peace.

content: {不知道这样的祥和会持续多久，所以需要无比珍惜。}
content_en: I don't know how long this peace will last, so we need to cherish it immensely.

content: {城主大人似乎说了很高深莫测的话呢。}
content_en: That sounded rather profound, Lord.

content: {有时候真的怀念多年前无忧无虑的时光。}
content_en: Sometimes I really miss the carefree days of many years ago.

content: {到了最后总是经历的越多越是愁眉不展。}
content_en: In the end, the more experiences you have, the more worried you become.

content: {城主大人总是这样，自己背上重重的担子。}
content_en: Lord, you're always like this, carrying such a heavy burden on your own.

content: {如果可以的话，我希望替城主大人分担一些重量。}
content_en: If possible, I wish I could help share some of that weight, Lord.

content: {你也有自己要完成的使命呢，这点小事，作为城主的我还扛得住。}
content_en: You have your own mission to accomplish. This little thing, as Lord, I can still bear it.

content: {即便如此。也希望此时此刻能够让城主大人轻松些许。}
content_en: Even so, I hope that at this moment I can lighten your burden just a little.

content: {如果能一直这样散步就好了。}
content_en: If only we could always walk together like this.

content: {会的，只要我们继续努力守护这份和平。}
content_en: We will, as long as we keep working hard to protect this peace.

content: {您看，那边的花，是居民们自发打理的。}
content_en: Look, those flowers over there, the residents take care of them voluntarily.

content: {真美……这是大家共同珍惜的证明。}
content_en: So beautiful... This is proof that everyone cherishes this place together.

content: {所以，请不要独自承担所有。}
content_en: So, please don't bear everything alone.

content: {至少，在感到疲惫时，记得我就在这里。}
content_en: At the very least, when you feel tired, remember that I am right here.

content: {嗯，我答应你。}
content_en: Hmm, I promise you.

content: {那说定了，这是约定。}
content_en: Then it's settled. That's a promise.

content: {好，约定好了。}
content_en: Okay, it's a promise.

content: {魔法气球炸开的时候，持有之人的心愿便会显现}
content_en: When the magical balloon bursts, the wish of the person holding it will appear.

content: {然而这次出了个意外。}
content_en: But this time something unexpected happened.

content: {原来我们威风凛凛的城主大人，约会时最惦记的，居然是自己的新鞋子啊！}
content_en: So our majestic Lord, during a date, was most concerned about his own new boots.

content: {你别笑了，这魔法气球肯定是出了什么故障。}
content_en: Stop laughing. This magical balloon must have malfunctioned.

content: {哦？那城主大人原本是想默念什么真心话呢？}
content_en: Oh? Then what heartfelt words were you originally thinking to yourself, Lord?

content: {我不过是看这气球新奇，想试试坊间的传闻到底灵不灵验，没别的心思。}
content_en: I was just curious about this new balloon and wanted to test whether the rumors were true. No other intention.

content: {是吗，我还以为，城主大人是想借着气球跟我告白呢~}
content_en: Is that so? I thought you were trying to confess your love to me through the balloon.

content: {就算要告白，我也不会用这种投机取巧的法子，自然会堂堂正正说给你听。}
content_en: Even if I were to confess, I wouldn't use such a cheap trick. I would tell you openly and honestly.

content: {可我倒觉得，刚才那句脱口而出的真心话，比任何精心准备的告白都要动人。}
content_en: But I think the heartfelt words you blurted out just now are more moving than any carefully prepared confession.

content: {动人？我堂堂一城之主当众出了这样的糗，你居然还觉得动人。}
content_en: Moving? I, the dignified Lord of this city, made such a fool of myself in public, and you actually find it moving?

content: {当然动人，平日里端方持重的城主大人，也有这样手忙脚乱的鲜活模样。}
content_en: Of course it's moving. The usually dignified and composed Lord also has such a flustered, lively side.

content: {这靴子是今早特意擦了半个时辰的，等下还要陪你逛遍整条街。}
content_en: I spent half an hour this morning carefully polishing these boots, and later I'll be walking with you through the whole street.

content: {我就知道，城主大人向来心细，连这些小事都替我考虑到了。}
content_en: I knew it. You've always been so attentive, even considering these little things for me.

content: {你清楚？我还以为，你只会觉得我小题大做。}
content_en: You know that? I thought you would just think I was making a big deal out of nothing.

content: {怎么会呢，比起永远完美无缺的城主雕像，我更爱这样有血有肉的你。}
content_en: How could I? Compared to a forever flawless statue of a Lord, I much prefer you like this, flesh and blood.

content: {什么雕像，我只是不想在你面前，出什么岔子而已。}
content_en: What statue? I just don't want to mess up in front of you.

content: {不管是威严的城主，还是会害羞窘迫的你，我都喜欢。}
content_en: Whether it's the majestic Lord or the shy and embarrassed you, I like both.

content: {你……，你突然说这些做什么，我还没准备好。}
content_en: You... why are you suddenly saying these things? I'm not ready yet.

content: {既然城主大人的气球没说出心里话，那不如，就让我先说给你听。}
content_en: Since your balloon didn't speak your heart, then let me say it to you first.

content: {好，你说，我安安静静听着。}
content_en: Okay, go ahead. I'll listen quietly.

content: {快看那边围栏里的猫猫，好多人都在投喂呢。}
content_en: Look at the cats in that enclosure over there. So many people are feeding them.

content: {是啊，一个个圆滚滚的，看着就格外招人喜欢。}
content_en: Yes, each one so round and plump, they look especially endearing.

content: {你在这稍等片刻，我去买两罐。}
content_en: Wait here a moment. I'll go buy two cans.

content: {怎么，城主大人也想和这些小家伙互动吗？}
content_en: What, Lord, do you want to interact with these little ones too?

content: {那当然，我要让你看看，我有多受小家伙们欢迎。}
content_en: Of course. I want to show you how popular I am with the little ones.

content: {哈哈，那我可就好好拭目以待咯。}
content_en: Haha, then I'll be watching with great anticipation.

content: {喏，两大罐满满的猫粮，看我的厉害。}
content_en: Here, two large cans full of cat food. Watch me go.

content: {你都蹲了好一会了，怎么没有猫猫过去找你呀？}
content_en: You've been squatting for a while, so why aren't any cats coming to you?

content: {我也不知道，明明我手里的猫粮更多。}
content_en: I don't know either. I clearly have more cat food in my hand.

content: {你看，它们全都颠颠跑到我这边来了。}
content_en: Look, they're all running over to my side.

content: {这些小家伙也太没眼光了吧。}
content_en: These little ones have no taste at all.

content: {还有两只胆子大的，都爬到我肩膀上了。}
content_en: And two bold ones have even climbed onto my shoulders.

content: {明明我的罐子更大，装的猫粮也更多。}
content_en: But my can is bigger and contains more cat food.

content: {怎么啦，威风凛凛的城主大人，这就委屈啦？}
content_en: What's wrong? Our majestic Lord is feeling slighted already?

content: {我才没有委屈，就是觉得它们不识货。}
content_en: I'm not slighted. I just think they don't know quality.

content: {好啦，别闹别扭了，我捧过来给你摸摸。}
content_en: Okay, don't be sulky. I'll bring some over for you to pet.

content: {不用，它们不找我，我才不摸它们。}
content_en: No need. If they don't come to me, I won't pet them.

content: {笨蛋城主，它们不选你，我选你呀。}
content_en: Silly Lord, if they won't choose you, I choose you.

content: {你，你突然说这个做什么？}
content_en: Y-you, why are you suddenly saying that?

content: {我说，比起这些猫猫，我眼里只有你呀。}
content_en: I'm saying, compared to these cats, I only have eyes for you.

content: {这家酒馆的招牌，据说喝下去的人，能看见心底最珍视的存在。}
content_en: This tavern's signature drink. It's said that whoever drinks it can see the existence they treasure most in their heart.

content: {我特意让老板留了两杯，你要不要试试？}
content_en: I specially asked the owner to save two glasses. Want to give it a try?

content: {我好像，真的看见了什么。}
content_en: I think I really see something.

content: {哦？你到底看见什么了？}
content_en: Oh? What exactly do you see?

content: {我看见我的兰德币的数量变成了9999999。}
content_en: I see my Rand Coin count has turned into 9,999,999.

content: {还有我的仓库里全是t6魔法使。}
content_en: And my warehouse is full of T6 Magic Messengers.

content: {城主大人的心里难道只有这些奇奇怪怪的东西吗？}
content_en: Is your heart filled with nothing but these strange things, Lord?

content: {不然呢？难道还有别的更重要的东西？}
content_en: What else? Is there something more important?

content: {难道城主大人心底，没有更重要的存在？}
content_en: Doesn't the Lord have someone more important in his heart?

content: {那是自然，确实有更重要的东西。}
content_en: Of course, there is indeed something more important.

content: {哦？那城主大人说说看，是什么东西？}
content_en: Oh? Then tell me, Lord, what is it?

content: {不过在此之前，我们先把美食点了吧。}
content_en: But before that, let's order the food first.

content: {为什么要先点美食，不先说说那个重要的东西？}
content_en: Why order food first instead of telling me what that important thing is?

content: {毕竟世上只有美食不可辜负。}
content_en: After all, only good food in this world should not be let down.

content: {原来在城主心里，美食和我是一样的分量？}
content_en: So in your heart, Lord, good food and I weigh the same?

content: {那可不一样，你比美食要重要得多。}
content_en: That's not the same. You are far more important than good food.

content: {那刚才还说，不能辜负共同的心底珍视？}
content_en: But you just said you can't let down what is treasured together?

content: {因为有你在，美食只有和珍视之人一起享用才值得。}
content_en: Because with you here, good food is only worth enjoying together with someone you treasure.

content: {算城主大人会说话，那快叫服务生过来吧。}
content_en: You sure know how to talk, Lord. Then quickly call the waiter over.
Okay.

content: {我在学院里练了好几年飞镖，十发九中。}
content_en: I practiced darts for several years at the academy. Nine out of ten hit the mark.

content: {哦，城主大人这是打算和我打个赌吗？}
content_en: Oh, Lord, are you planning to make a bet with me?

content: {没错，我要是三镖全中靶心，你就答应我下次约会陪我去城郊的花海。}
content_en: That's right. If I hit the bullseye with all three darts, you'll promise to accompany me to the flower fields on the outskirts for our next date.

content: {那要是城主大人输了呢？}
content_en: And if you lose, Lord?

content: {我输了的话，全城的甜点铺，你随便挑，我全包了。}
content_en: If I lose, you can pick any dessert shop in the whole city, and I'll cover everything.

content: {好啊，那我可就等着城主大人兑现承诺了。}
content_en: Fine, then I'll be waiting for you to make good on that promise, Lord.

content: {看好了，这第一镖，必中靶心。}
content_en: Watch closely. This first dart will surely hit the bullseye.

content: {噗，看来城主大人的准头，和说的话不太一样啊。}
content_en: Pfft, it seems your aim, Lord, doesn't quite match your words.

content: {刚才是手滑，第二镖绝对不会出问题。}
content_en: That was just a slip of the hand. The second dart will definitely be fine.

content: {这一镖，好像离靶心更远了呢。}
content_en: This dart seems to have gone even farther from the bullseye.

content: {怎么可能，我明明瞄准了的。}
content_en: How is that possible? I clearly aimed.

content: {看来，全城的甜点铺，今天要迎来大生意了。}
content_en: It seems all the dessert shops in the city are going to have a big day today.

content: {别急，我还有最后一镖，这一镖绝对中。}
content_en: Don't rush. I have one last dart. This one will definitely hit.

content: {等等，不如让我来帮城主大人投这最后一镖吧。}
content_en: Wait, how about I throw this last dart for you, Lord?

content: {你，你还会玩飞镖？}
content_en: Y-you know how to play darts too?

content: {试试不就知道了，总不能让城主大人输得太难看。}
content_en: Try it and you'll find out. Can't let the Lord lose too embarrassingly.

content: {天呐，你居然直接命中了靶心。}
content_en: Good heavens, you actually hit the bullseye directly.

content: {靶心我帮你中了，花海的约会，我也答应了。}
content_en: I hit the bullseye for you, and I also agree to the date at the flower fields.

content: {为什么，我明明输了赌约的。}
content_en: Why? I clearly lost the bet.

content: {毕竟，总不能让城主大人，既输了赌约，又丢了约会的机会。}
content_en: After all, I couldn't let the Lord both lose the bet and miss out on a date.

content: {城主大人写了什么愿望？这么神秘，还贴得这么高。}
content_en: What wish did you write, Lord? So mysterious, and pasted so high.

content: {不告诉你，说出来的愿望，可就不灵了。}
content_en: Not telling you. A wish spoken aloud won't come true.

content: {那城主大人，要不要我也写一张，贴在你的旁边？}
content_en: Then Lord, shall I also write one and paste it next to yours?

content: {当然可以，想写什么都可以，我给你拿笔。}
content_en: Of course you can. You can write anything you like. I'll get you a pen.

content: {我写好了，就贴在城主的愿望旁边，刚好凑成一对。}
content_en: I'm done. I'll paste it right next to the Lord's wish, making a perfect pair.

content: {我看看，你到底写了什么，这么快就写完了。}
content_en: Let me see what you wrote. You finished so quickly.

content: {希望城主下次约会，别再被守城卫兵认出来，半条街外就开始行礼。}
content_en: I hope that next time the Lord goes on a date, the city guards won't recognize him and start bowing from half a street away.

content: {合着你写的愿望，就是吐槽我上次约会，被全城人围观的事？}
content_en: So your wish is basically to complain about how I was gawked at by the whole city during our last date?

content: {毕竟那次的经历，我到现在都记得清清楚楚，实在是太难忘了。}
content_en: That experience is still so clear in my mind. It was truly unforgettable.

content: {那我可得再加一个愿望，下次约会一定藏好身份，绝不让任何人打扰我们。}
content_en: Then I need to add another wish: next time I'll definitely hide my identity and never let anyone disturb us.

content: {哦？城主大人的愿望里，难道还有别的内容？}
content_en: Oh? Does the Lord's wish contain something else as well?

content: {当然有，我的愿望里，一直都有你。}
content_en: Of course. My wish always includes you.

content: {那城主大人倒是说说看，藏在心里的愿望，到底是什么？}
content_en: Then tell me, Lord, what exactly is the wish hidden in your heart?

content: {愿这座城岁岁安宁，愿身边的人，年年都能常伴左右。}
content_en: May this city be peaceful year after year. May the person by my side always be with me through the years.

content: {城主大人的愿望，一半给了这座城，一半给了身边的人呢。}
content_en: The Lord's wish: half for the city, half for the person beside him.

content: {这座城是我的责任，而你，是我心底的期许。}
content_en: This city is my responsibility, and you are my heart's hope.

content: {那我们把这两张许愿笺贴得再近一点，好不好，让它们永远挨在一起。}
content_en: Then let's paste these two wish slips even closer together, okay? Let them always stay side by side.

content: {好，不仅是许愿笺，我也想永远和你挨在一起。}
content_en: Okay. Not just the wish slips, I also want to stay by your side forever.

content: {那这可是我们的约定，城主大人可不许反悔，要一直陪着我。}
content_en: Then this is our promise. You mustn't go back on it, Lord. Stay with me always.

content: {我答应你，约定好了，永远都不会反悔。}
content_en: I promise you. It's a deal. I will never go back on it.

content: {站住，何人擅闯领地麦田！}
content_en: Halt! Who dares to trespass on the territory's wheat field!

content: {城主大人，发生什么事了？}
content_en: Lord, what's happening?

content: {快躲到我身后，麦丛里有陌生身影。}
content_en: Quickly hide behind me. There's an unfamiliar figure in the wheat.

content: {哈哈，城主大人你先别紧张。}
content_en: Haha, Lord, don't get so nervous.

content: {你仔细看看，那根本不是人呀。}
content_en: Look closer. That's not a person at all.

content: {什么，难道我看错了？}
content_en: What? Did I see wrong?

content: {那只是个绑了披风的稻草人而已。}
content_en: That's just a scarecrow tied with a cloak.

content: {难不成，你要按领地规矩审它吗？}
content_en: Are you going to interrogate it according to territory law?

content: {我只是，怕有歹人惊扰到你。}
content_en: I just... was afraid some ill-intentioned person might startle you.

content: {这片麦田是我规划的，绝不能出意外。}
content_en: This wheat field is my project. There must be no accidents.

content: {好好好，我知道城主大人最负责了。}
content_en: Okay, okay, I know you're the most responsible, Lord.

content: {不过，你刚才耳尖都红了哦。}
content_en: But your earlobes just turned red, you know.

content: {胡说，我只是被太阳晒到了而已。}
content_en: Nonsense. I just got a bit of sun.

content: {是吗，那你摘这颗麦穗做什么？}
content_en: Is that so? Then why are you picking this ear of wheat?

content: {这是田里长得最好的麦穗，我摘给你的。}
content_en: This is the best ear of wheat in the field. I picked it for you.

content: {毕竟是带你来的地方，半分风险都不能有。}
content_en: After all, this is where I brought you. I can't allow even half a risk.

content: {哪怕是稻草人，也要问过它准不准靠近你。}
content_en: Even a scarecrow, I have to ask its permission to come near you.

content: {笨蛋城主，你也太可爱了吧。}
content_en: Silly Lord, you're just too adorable.

content: {我身为一城之主，和可爱可沾不上边。}
content_en: As the Lord of this city, I have nothing to do with "adorable."

content: {在我这里，你永远是最可爱的人。}
content_en: In my eyes, you will always be the most adorable person.

content: {传说郊外的小溪里面藏着历任城主留下的专属秘宝。}
content_en: Legend says that in the stream on the outskirts, there is a secret treasure left by each successive Lord.

content: {专属秘宝，听起来也太神秘了吧？}
content_en: A secret treasure? That sounds so mysterious!

content: {全领地上下，只有我一个人知道它的藏匿位置。}
content_en: In the entire territory, only I know where it's hidden.

content: {那城主大人，可要好好露一手别让我失望哦。}
content_en: Then Lord, you'd better show off your skills and not disappoint me.

content: {奇怪，我明明就把东西藏在这块石缝里的。}
content_en: Strange, I clearly hid it in this crevice.

content: {怎么了，难道秘宝自己长脚跑了不成？}
content_en: What's wrong? Did the treasure grow legs and run away?

content: {不对劲，礼盒真的不见了一点踪迹都没有。}
content_en: This isn't right. The gift box has truly vanished without a trace.

content: {你看那几条溪鱼，莫不是被它们叼走了？}
content_en: Look at those stream fish. Could they have taken it?

content: {总不能是我被溪鱼截胡了，这也太没面子了。}
content_en: I can't have been beaten to it by fish. That would be too embarrassing.

content: {找不到秘宝也没关系，我们抓鱼当今天的秘宝就好。}
content_en: It's okay if we don't find the treasure. We can catch fish and call that today's treasure.

content: {本来是想给你准备惊喜的，结果搞成了这样。}
content_en: I meant to prepare a surprise for you, but it turned out like this.

content: {那等下抓到的鱼，可要分我最大的一条当赔礼。}
content_en: Then you have to give me the biggest fish we catch as an apology.

content: {等等，你看下游那块石缝里是不是我的礼盒？}
content_en: Wait, look downstream. Isn't that my gift box in that crevice?

content: {真的哎，肯定是被刚才的水流冲下去了。}
content_en: Yes, really! It must have been washed down by the current.

content: {还好找回来了，不然我今天可真要丢大脸了。}
content_en: Good thing I found it. Otherwise, I would have really lost face today.

content: {这枚吊坠，也太精致好看了吧。}
content_en: This pendant is so exquisite and beautiful.

content: {本来想给你个完美的惊喜，没想到差点出了意外。}
content_en: I wanted to give you a perfect surprise, but I didn't expect it to almost go wrong.

content: {比起完美的惊喜，这样手忙脚乱的你更可爱。}
content_en: Compared to a perfect surprise, you flustered like this are even more adorable.

content: {那，我能亲手给你戴上这枚吊坠吗？}
content_en: Then, may I put this pendant on you myself?

content: {当然可以，我的城主大人。}
content_en: Of course you may, my Lord.

content: {快过来，小心脚下，别被藤蔓勾到裙摆了。}
content_en: Come here quickly. Watch your step. Don't let the vines catch your skirt.

content: {堂堂一城之主，居然带我来翻果园的墙，也太不正经了。}
content_en: The dignified Lord of a city, actually bringing me to climb over the orchard wall. That's so improper.

content: {这叫浪漫，全领地只有你能有这个待遇。}
content_en: This is called romance. In the whole territory, only you get this treatment.

content: {你看树梢那颗，红得透亮，肯定是整个果园最甜的蜜果。}
content_en: Look at that one on the treetop. It's so bright red. It must be the sweetest fruit in the whole orchard.

content: {等着，我这就爬上去摘下来给你尝尝。}
content_en: Wait here. I'll climb up and pick it for you to taste.

content: {哇，果肉好饱满，隔着果皮都能闻到甜香。}
content_en: Wow, the flesh is so plump. Even through the skin, you can smell its sweet fragrance.

content: {嘘，别出声，有巡逻卫兵的脚步声过来了。}
content_en: Shh, don't make a sound. The footsteps of the patrolling guards are coming this way.

content: {是卫兵吗，我们现在跑还来得及吗。}
content_en: Is it the guards? Can we still run?

content: {快躲进树丛里，千万别发出声音。}
content_en: Quickly hide in the bushes. Don't make a sound, no matter what.

content: {唔…城主你捂得我都快喘不过气了。}
content_en: Mmm... Lord, you're covering me so tightly I can hardly breathe.

content: {再忍忍，脚步声离我们越来越近了。}
content_en: Bear with it a little longer. The footsteps are getting closer.

content: {太好了，脚步声终于走远了，我们安全了。}
content_en: Great, the footsteps have finally faded away. We're safe.

content: {你刚才憋笑憋得脸都红了，就这么好笑吗。}
content_en: You were holding back laughter so hard your face turned red. Was it really that funny?

content: {噗嗤，当然好笑，哪有人偷自己家果子还要躲卫兵的。}
content_en: Pfft, of course it's funny. Who steals fruit from their own home and has to hide from the guards?

content: {啊…说的也是，我怎么把这事给忘了。}
content_en: Ah... you're right. How could I have forgotten that?

content: {笨蛋城主，跟我在一起的时候，连自己是城主都记不住了吗。}
content_en: Silly Lord, when you're with me, you even forget that you're the Lord?

content: {来，坐这根粗树枝上，这里能看到整片夜空的月亮。}
content_en: Come, sit on this thick branch. From here you can see the moon in the whole night sky.

content: {这蜜果真的好甜，就像城主大人给我的感觉一样。}
content_en: This honey fruit is so sweet, just like the feeling you give me, Lord.

content: {下次我们光明正大地来，带最大的篮子，摘满整个果园。}
content_en: Next time we'll come openly, bring the biggest basket, and pick the whole orchard full.

content: {好，那我们一言为定，这是只属于我们两个人的约定。}
content_en: Okay, then it's settled. This is a promise that belongs only to the two of us.
